Explanation: Total number of sequence nodes in the variation graph.
Nodes present in ≤ 5% of haplotypes (private/rare regions).
Nodes present in > 5% and < 95% of haplotypes (variable regions).
Nodes present in ≥ 95% of haplotypes (highly conserved core).
Total number of graph edges connecting nodes.
Average number of connections per node.
Proportion of observed vs. possible connections.
Number of haplotype paths represented in the graph.
Genome-wide average nucleotide diversity across paths.
